summary: This is an extremely brief personal post where Joel Spolsky notes that it is snowing in New York City and shares a link to some photos he took. There is no substantive argument or technical content. It is essentially a micro-blog entry from the early days of his blog.
key_points: Joel documents a snow day in New York City with photos
The post reflects the early blogging era when personal micro-updates were common
money_quotes: It's snowing today in New York City.
key_insight: This is a trivial personal update with no technical or professional insight, characteristic of early-2000s blogging culture.
